title: Update default destination when clicking company logo?
excerpt: I have been unable to locate the solution to this issue on my own, so I figured I would reach out to the community for some help.  When clicking on the company logo in the upper lefthand corner of my browser, I am re-dir…

posts.author: RyanSLO (Ryan Schomber)
posts.cookedHtml: I have been unable to locate the solution to this issue on my own, so I figured I would reach out to the community for some help. When clicking on the company logo in the upper lefthand corner of my browser, I am re-directed to a board that is not terribly convenient to have as my default destination. Is there a way to update where I am directed to when clicking the logo?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @RyanSLO! The amin of the account should be able to adjust the default homepage by navigating to their admin settings > general > account home page.

Alternatively you can activate the home page feature through monday.labs:

Screen Shot 2022-11-14 at 10.46.18 am1216×390 43 KB

Hope this helps!
